chapter_title: Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
text:
(a) A driver’s license suspension under this chapter takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person:

(1) receives a notice of suspension under Section 524.011 (Officer’s Duties for Driver’s License Suspension) ; or

(2) is presumed to have received notice of suspension under Section 524.013 (Notice of Department’s Determination) .

(b) A suspension under this chapter may not be probated.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 524. Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
##### § 524.021 — Suspension Effective Date

(a) A driver’s license suspension under this chapter takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person:

    (1) receives a notice of suspension under Section 524.011 (Officer’s Duties for Driver’s License Suspension) ; or

    (2) is presumed to have received notice of suspension under Section 524.013 (Notice of Department’s Determination) .

(b) A suspension under this chapter may not be probated.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a

receives a notice of suspension under Section 524.011 (Officer’s Duties for Driver’s License Suspension) ; or
is presumed to have received notice of suspension under Section 524.013 (Notice of Department’s Determination) .

subsections.label: b
